t-1.notes: feature: stack detection · extLang @ internal/stack/detect.go · maps .dart/.svelte/.sql to dart/svelte/sql so DetectLanguages recognises the v0.2 stacks

t-2.notes: feature: stack profiles · profiles/*.toml @ internal/stack/profiles · five embedded go:embed profiles (kotlin/dart/svelte/sql/typescript) each with one dedicated analyzer; svelte+typescript share eslint, sql declares no runtime

t-3.notes: feature: stack detection · TestDetectResolvesEmbeddedProfiles @ internal/stack/detect_test.go · proves each embedded profile (incl. typescript) is detectable by signal + CLI list/show surface, with unsupported and go-polyglot guards

t-4.notes: feature: quality analyzer catalog · TestAnalyzersForLanguageProfiles @ internal/quality/catalog_test.go · proves each profile's dedicated analyzer (detekt/dcm/eslint/sqlfluff/eslint) surfaces with a substantive dimension; pins svelte vs typescript eslint install hints apart

t-5.notes: feature: security scanner catalog · TestScannersForLanguageProfilesAgnosticOnly @ internal/security/catalog_test.go · enforces security_agnostic_only: each of the five profiles' scanner set equals {gitleaks,semgrep,trivy} exactly

t-6.notes: feature: runtime seeding · TestRuntimeSeededForLanguageProfiles @ internal/stack/runtime_test.go · proves kotlin/dart/svelte/typescript declare seedable test+build runtime and sql declares none
